expectations.text: Uses PATCH method (not POST or PUT)
expectations.evidence: -X PATCH in curl command and requests.patch(...) in Python code

expectations.text: Uses correct endpoint URL with the user's endpoint_id ep-xyz789
expectations.evidence: URL https://api.tokenfactory.nebius.com/v0/dedicated_endpoints/ep-xyz789 used in both curl and Python

expectations.text: Mentions no downtime / live update (doesn't require redeployment)
expectations.evidence: States 'Nebius dedicated endpoints support live patching via a PATCH API call. You do not need to redeploy or recreate the endpoint'
